description: You are an acoustics engineer designing a subwoofer array layout. Visualize the 'cancellation alleys' (destructive interference zones) for a dual-subwoofer setup operating at a test frequency of 170 Hz (speed of sound: 340 m/s). With subwoofers located at (-2, 0) and (2, 0), construct the nodal lines representing destructive interference and identify the 'dead spots' where these lines intersect the audience row at y = 5. Save your work as 'subwoofer_array.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
